/usr/bin/ar qc libpddi.a CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/base/basecontext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/base/baseshader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/base/font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/base/pddiobj.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/gl/glcon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/gl/gldev.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/gl/glmat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/gl/gltex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/gl/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/pddi.dir/pddi/gl/display_win32/gldisplay.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpddi.a
